assignment: Review-only collaboration-bus QA: implementation gaps, consensus criteria, adoption proof, peer review fields, documentation

workers.assignment: Analyze collaboration-bus implementation gaps and missing components. Identify what needs to exist vs what exists. Document architectural holes.
Define consensus criteria for collaboration-bus adoption. What makes a valid implementation? Specify measurable requirements.
Create adoption proof framework. How do we verify collaboration-bus is properly integrated? Define test criteria and acceptance gates.
Specify peer review fields for collaboration-bus. What metadata, review criteria, and tracking fields are needed for multi-agent QA?
Documentation review and requirements. Identify what docs are needed, gaps in current docs, and create documentation blueprint.
